recommendations.title: The Craft: Legacy
recommendations.overview: An eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

recommendations.title: Shooting Dogs
recommendations.overview: Two westerners, a priest and a teacher find themselves in the middle of the Rwandan genocide and face a moral dilemna. Do they place themselves in danger and protect the refugees, or escape the country with their lives? Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Sing Street
recommendations.overview: A boy growing up in Dublin during the 1980s escapes his strained family life by starting a band to impress the mysterious girl he likes.

recommendations.title: Let Go
recommendations.overview: A jaded mother makes a last-ditch effort to keep her family together by taking them on a trip to their teenage daughter’s pole dancing competition.
